      value: '38 min',
      trend: 'down',
      rating: 'elite',
      description: 'How quickly we restore service after an incident.',

    {
      name: 'Change Failure Rate',
      value: '4.8%',
      trend: 'down',
      rating: 'high',

      benchmark: '0–15%',
    },
  ]}
/>

## Improvement Initiatives

| Initiative | Owner | Target | Impact on metric |
|---|---|---|---|
| Async pipeline (RFC-002) | James Liu | Sprint 5 | ↓ Lead Time |
| Automated rollback on failure rate spike | Priya Shah | Sprint 6 | ↓ MTTR, ↓ CFR |
| PR size limits (max 400 lines) | Team | Now | ↑ Deployment Frequency |
| Phase 1 parallelism | James Liu | Sprint 5 | ↑ Deployment Frequency |
